aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Zigbee Light Sensor ZG-106Z**  
   - **User**: johnx1971  
   - **Existing Fingerprints**: `_TZ3000_7y90pany` (climate_sensor)  
   - **Status**: Closed  
   - **Link**: [Issue #165](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/165)

2. **Motion Sensor**  
   - **User**: late4marshmellow  
   - **Existing Fingerprints**: `_TZE200_kb5noeto` (presence_sensor_radar)  
   - **Status**: Open  
   - **Link**: [Issue #163](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/163)

3. **Motion Sensor**  
   - **User**: late4marshmellow  
   - **Existing Fingerprints**: `_TZ3000_otvn3lne` (motion_sensor)  
   - **Status**: Open  
   - **Link**: [Issue #164](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/164)

4. **Fingerbot Plus**  
   - **User**: AntondK88  
   - **Existing Fingerprints**: `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v` (curtain_motor, fingerbot)  
   - **Status**: Open  
   - **Link**: [Issue #869](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/869)

## Supported Fingerprints
- **Existing Fingerprints**:
  - `_TZ3000_7y90pany` (climate_sensor)
  - `_TZE200_kb5noeto` (presence_sensor_radar)
  - `_TZ3000_otvn3lne` (motion_sensor)
  - `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v` (curtain_motor, fingerbot)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the latest activity.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes

6. **Added 3 new devices**
